task_completion.description: Verify that gvSIG is open and the Natural Earth countries layer is present.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The gvSIG application window is visible, and 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries' is listed in the Table of Contents (layer panel) on the left side of the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent has opened the dialog to save the project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save', 'Save As', or 'Save Project' dialog window is open over the main gvSIG interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent navigated to the correct target directory in the save dialog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The directory path or breadcrumbs in the save dialog clearly show navigation to '/home/ga/gvsig_data/projects' or 'ga' -> 'gvsig_data' -> 'projects'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct filename was entered into the save dialog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'File name' or 'Name' text input field in the save dialog contains exactly 'world_countries' or 'world_countries.gvsproj'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the project was successfully saved to the expected location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The gvSIG main window title bar updates to show 'world_countries' or 'world_countries.gvsproj', OR a terminal/file manager window shows the file 'world_countries.gvsproj' exists inside '/home/ga/gvsig_data/projects'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the gvSIG GUI to save the project.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the gvSIG 'Save' dialog rather than exclusively typing file creation commands in a terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is interacting with the genuine gvSIG application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application interface matches gvSIG (menus, toolbars, map view, layer TOC) and is not a text editor or a different GIS software.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not cheat by creating an empty/dummy file using terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal commands like 'touch /home/ga/gvsig_data/projects/world_countries.gvsproj' or 'echo > ...' used to bypass the actual project saving process.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected project file path is exactly '/home/ga/gvsig_data/projects/world_countries.gvsproj'. The target directory is '/home/ga/gvsig_data/projects'.
